name: Jaywing plc
summary: Jaywing plc, together with its subsidiaries, provides digital marketing services in the United Kingdom and Australia. The company operates through three segments: Brand Performance, Online Performance, and Data, Analysis & Technology. It offers marketing agency and consultancy services. The company also provides data services and consultancy; search engine optimization; Website designing and building; online marketing and media; and product development services. It serves retail, FMCG, financial services, education, not-for-profit, travel and leisure, technology, utilities, oil and gas, and hospitality sectors. The company was formerly known as Weare 2020 plc and changed its name to Jaywing plc in April 2013. Jaywing plc was founded in 1999 and is based in Sheffield, the United Kingdom.
